name: @codexthemes/skills
description: Official agent skills for creating and validating Codex desktop themes.

scripts.validate: tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/codex-theme-creator && tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/codex-theme-submitter && tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/codex-theme-finder && tsx skills/codex-theme-creator/scripts/validate-skill.ts skills/codex-theme-installer
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run validate && npm test
